message:
bd-35iz1: Evidence Ledger for supervision decisions

Add BindingConstraint, EvidenceEntry, and EvidenceLedger types that
capture the full reasoning chain for every supervision decision.
Supervisor::on_failure_with_budget now records exactly one evidence
entry per call, identifying which constraint was binding (monotone
severity, explicit stop, window exhaustion, budget refusal, restart
allowed, or escalate). 17 tests verify all decision paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
